👤 Owner: NirvanaOn

📝 Repository: NirvanaOn/SpotifyC2

📝 Repository: MazX0p/LACUNA-Chain

👤 Owner: Zuigetzu

item.title: 📝 TheTsarDev/XNET (16 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: TheTsarDev

📝 Repository: TheTsarDev/XNET

📄 Descrizione: Secure communications for the original Xbox. XNET provides end-to-end encrypted text chat, voice chat, video chat, and secure file transfer on retail hardware. Built with NXDK, it uses a lightweight content-blind relay architecture and requires no accounts or centralized message storage.

⭐ Stelle: 16

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: encryption homebrew nxdk og-xbox original-xbox xbox xbox-homebrew

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-25T06:47:27Z

👤 Owner: Attack-Phantom

📝 Repository: Attack-Phantom/FlipperZero-PhantomCN-Firmware

📄 Descrizione: 面向中国 Flipper Zero 爱好者的汉化定制固件，基于 Momentum (mntm-012)。全量中文界面 + 宋体字库、Bad Apple 桌面动画，内置 BLE Killer、SubGHz PT2262 暴力破解，以及射频干扰、特斯拉等 Sub-GHz 信号包，开箱即用。欢迎 Star、Fork、提 Issue 交流。

⭐ Stelle: 14

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

item.title: 📝 The412Banner/Bannerlator (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: The412Banner

📝 Repository: The412Banner/Bannerlator

📄 Descrizione: Bannerlator — run Windows PC games and apps on Android (Wine + Box64/86). A personal, community-driven continuation of the discontinued Winlator Star Bionic project. GitHub Actions builds + releases.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License
